display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.4 伪交互识别修正版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: fixes Maintenance Rabbit false-green results when radio/checkbox controls only change selected styling but provide no second-layer content or experience. Such incomplete interaction is now marked unknown/red rather than healthy; Maintenance Rabbit will not invent missing content. Retains mirror-scoped ID/for/name/CSS repair, 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, Menu QR v2.1, full-chain diagnostics, thinking isolation, and all existing generation features.
